metadata.publisher: Ghana Publishing Company Limited (Assembly Press), Accra
metadata.source_authority: Parliament of the Republic of Ghana
metadata.source_note: Section 112 (tax reliefs) of the same Assembly Press Act 766 print already captured for section 3 (axiom-corpus#256): subsection (2) treats contributions not exceeding sixteen and one half per centum of a contributor's monthly income as deductible income for the contributor's and the employer's income tax, to the extent of their respective contributions. Amendment diligence as for the section 3 slice: Act 883 (2014) does not alter section 112.
metadata.title: National Pensions Act, 2008 (Act 766) — section 112, tax reliefs
